overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with pink hair exploring a futuristic urban environment. The sequence includes walking through city streets, interacting with an NPC under a tree, observing a crashed vehicle site, and ascending a long concrete stairway through overgrown terrain.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide futuristic city sidewalk with a distinctive pink cylindrical building on the right and a geodesic dome visible in the distance. The street is relatively empty with a few futuristic vehicles driving by.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded plaza and approaches an NPC sitting on a circular concrete bench under a large tree. The camera focuses on the interaction between the two characters, with the background showing a curved building facade.

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the plaza and proceeds uphill along a road lined with palm trees and red apartment buildings. Several futuristic vehicles pass by on the road, including a blue truck.

segments.scene_description: The character enters an area with a crashed shuttle wreckage surrounded by concrete barriers and overgrown vegetation. Two NPCs are present—one sweeping near the wreckage and another spray-painting pink graffiti on the walls.

agents.ego_description: climbing the long concrete stairway surrounded by overgrown bushes and walls

simple metal bench at the bottom of the stair section

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long concrete stairway flanked by tall walls and dense overgrown vegetation. The geodesic dome structure becomes visible again at the top of the stairs as the character continues climbing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city that transitions from polished urban sidewalks to an overgrown, industrial ascent. It begins with the character walking along a wide sidewalk past a pink cylindrical building toward a distant geodesic dome. As the character enters a shaded plaza, the camera focuses on an interaction with an NPC resting under a large tree before shifting away to follow a road lined with palm trees and red apartment buildings. The scene then opens into a derelict area featuring crashed shuttle wreckage and NPCs tending to the site amidst concrete barriers and wild greenery. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they climb a long concrete stairway flanked by dense vegetation, ascending until the geodesic dome reappears at the summit.
